hero.title: Hi, I'm Andri Amaro
hero.subtitle: Full Stack Developer passionate about building beautiful, performant, and accessible dashboards. Pulse is my authorial project, built with the most modern technologies available.

story.title: The Pulse Story
story.p1: Pulse was born from my frustration with existing dashboard templates: many were outdated, poorly organized, or simply ugly. I knew I could build something better.
story.p2: I decided to build from scratch a theme I'd actually want to use — with modern architecture (React 19, Next.js 16, strict TypeScript), reusable components with CVA, and a complete design system with premium dark mode.
story.p3: The result is Pulse: 96 components, 16 themed dashboards, 126 pages, and support for 3 languages. A theme that outperforms $99 competitors in both technical and visual quality.

y1.title: Project Inception
y1.description: Frustrated with existing templates, I started planning a better solution.

y2.title: Foundation
y2.description: Architecture defined: React 19, Next.js 16, strict TypeScript, Atomic Design.

y3.title: First Dashboards
y3.description: 16 dashboards created: Finance, CRM, SaaS, Crypto, Restaurant, Real Estate...

y4.title: Complete Design System
y4.description: 96 components finalized. Premium dark mode. Advanced animations.

y5.title: Today
y5.description: i18n in 3 languages. 126 pages. Ready for the world.

tech.title: Tech Stack
tech.subtitle: Built with the most modern tools in the React ecosystem

react.title: React 19
react.description: The latest version with concurrent features and improved performance.

nextjs.title: Next.js 16
nextjs.description: App Router, Server Components, and automatic optimizations.

typescript.title: TypeScript
typescript.description: Strict mode, generics, zero any — 100% typed codebase.

tailwind.title: Tailwind CSS v4
tailwind.description: Custom design system with native CSS variables.

cva.title: CVA
cva.description: Class Variance Authority for type-safe component variants.

intl.title: next-intl
intl.description: Full internationalization with 3 languages (PT, EN, ES).

included.title: What's Included

components.title: 96 Components

darkMode.title: Premium Dark Mode
darkMode.description: Custom design with card glow, glassmorphism, and animated gradients.

i18n.title: 3 Languages
i18n.description: Português, English, Español — complete i18n and easy to expand.

responsive.title: 100% Responsive
